allow: Bash(node -e "const {createClient} = require\('@libsql/client'\); const c = createClient\({url:'file:prisma/dev.db'}\); c.execute\('SELECT 1'\).then\(r => console.log\('OK', r\)\).catch\(e => console.log\('ERR', e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const {createClient}=require\('@libsql/client'\); const c=createClient\({url:'file:prisma/dev.db'}\); c.execute\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'\\"\).then\(r=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows\)\)\)")
